entries.text: Replayable feature tours — access any tour from the sidebar or Help menu
"What's new" panel shows release highlights automatically after each update
Cursor-based pagination for large plant collections (up to 200 plants per page)
Virtualised plant list with react-window for collections over 40 plants
Storybook design system catalogue — run npm run storybook
Motion tokens and Framer Motion micro-interactions throughout the UI
Outbreak detection and bulk treatment for pest and disease incidents
Bulk plant import from photos using Gemini AI species identification
QR code tags — generate and scan plant labels for instant access
Analytics: watering heatmap, care consistency score, and health distribution charts
Seasonal care adjustments powered by Gemini recommendations
Propagation tracker — log cuttings, seedlings, and divisions
Harvest log for edible plants and herbs
Phenology events — record flowering, fruiting, and seasonal milestones
Offline support — mutations are queued and replayed when back online
Watering pattern anomaly detection now ignores plants watered early
